metadata.description: Circle: Holacracy-based development workflow with distributed roles

plugins.name: circle
plugins.description: 18 skills (9 holacracy roles + 9 utilities) — domain-agnostic core with extensibility contract for platform-review companion plugins; structured workflows, quality gates, self-verification guardrails, anti-overcomplication checks, TDD enforcement, and security audits

plugins.name: circle-ios
plugins.description: iOS platform-review companion for Circle — auto-activates under /circle:code-review on iOS PRs (Package.swift, *.xcodeproj, *.swift markers), or runs standalone via /circle-ios:ios-review
